title: VCreateSequence Method, Spel Class
parameters: SequenceName	String expression containing the name of a vision sequence to create.
description: Creates a new vision sequence in the current project.
notes: For a complete list of vision properties and how to use them, see the Vision Guide manuals.
see_also:
VCreateObject

VDeleteObject

VDeleteSequence

VCreateSequence Example

VB Example:

m_spel.VCreateSequence("myseq")

C# Example:

m_spel.VCreateSequence("myseq");
